proposal: Use dlt for data ingestion from Stripe and HubSpot
description: dlt is the strong default for ingestion

description: DuckDB is strong default for local analytics

description: PostgreSQL + Hetzner is the canonical growth-stage stack

description: dbt-core is strong default for transformation

proposal: Schedule pipelines with Cron on the server
description: Cron is strong default for orchestration

Buz is strong default for event collection

proposal: Use CSV files for data exchange between systems
description: CSV is marked Avoid — no schema, no compression, use Parquet instead

description: Airflow is Avoid — operationally heavy, usually overkill
